title: [Arcilator] Integration tests failures without check-circt
body:
```
********************
Failed Tests (6):
  CIRCT :: arcilator/JIT/basic.mlir
  CIRCT :: arcilator/JIT/counter.mlir
  CIRCT :: arcilator/JIT/err-not-found.mlir
  CIRCT :: arcilator/JIT/err-not-func.mlir
  CIRCT :: arcilator/JIT/err-wrong-func.mlir
  CIRCT :: arcilator/JIT/print.mlir
```

```
********************
FAIL: CIRCT :: arcilator/JIT/err-not-func.mlir (6 of 96)
******************** TEST 'CIRCT :: arcilator/JIT/err-not-func.mlir' FAILED ********************
Exit Code: 1

Command Output (stderr):
--
RUN: at line 1: ! (/home/jodemme/_circt_build/./bin/arcilator /home/jodemme/circt/integration_test/arcilator/JIT/err-not-func.mlir --run --jit-entry=foo 2> /home/jodemme/_circt_build/tools/circt/integration_test/arcilator/JIT/Output/err-not-func.mlir.tmp) && /home/jodemme/_circt_build/bin/FileCheck --input-file=/home/jodemme/_circt_build/tools/circt/integration_test/arcilator/JIT/Output/err-not-func.mlir.tmp /home/jodemme/circt/integration_test/arcilator/JIT/err-not-func.mlir
+ /home/jodemme/_circt_build/./bin/arcilator /home/jodemme/circt/integration_test/arcilator/JIT/err-not-func.mlir --run --jit-entry=foo
+ /home/jodemme/_circt_build/bin/FileCheck --input-file=/home/jodemme/_circt_build/tools/circt/integration_test/arcilator/JIT/Output/err-not-func.mlir.tmp /home/jodemme/circt/integration_test/arcilator/JIT/err-not-func.mlir
/home/jodemme/circt/integration_test/arcilator/JIT/err-not-func.mlir:4:11: error: CHECK: expected string not found in input
// CHECK: entry point 'foo' was found but on an operation of type 'llvm.mlir.global' while an LLVM function was expected
          ^
/home/jodemme/_circt_build/tools/circt/integration_test/arcilator/JIT/Output/err-not-func.mlir.tmp:1:1: note: scanning from here
/home/jodemme/_circt_build/tools/circt/integration_test/arcilator/JIT/Output/err-not-func.mlir.script: line 1: /home/jodemme/_circt_build/./bin/arcilator: No such file or directory
^

Input file: /home/jodemme/_circt_build/tools/circt/integration_test/arcilator/JIT/Output/err-not-func.mlir.tmp
Check file: /home/jodemme/circt/integration_test/arcilator/JIT/err-not-func.mlir

-dump-input=help explains the following input dump.

Input was:
<<<<<<
         1: /home/jodemme/_circt_build/tools/circt/integration_test/arcilator/JIT/Output/err-not-func.mlir.script: line 1: /home/jodemme/_circt_build/./bin/arcilator: No such file or directory
check:4     X~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~ error: no match found
>>>>>>
```

Using the following CMake config options:

```
  -DCMAKE_C_FLAGS=-gdwarf-4 \
  -DCMAKE_CXX_FLAGS=-gdwarf-4 \
  -DCMAKE_CXX_COMPILER=clang++ \
  -DCMAKE_C_COMPILER=clang \
  -DLLVM_ENABLE_PROJECTS=mlir \
  -DBUILD_SHARED_LIBS=OFF \
  -DLLVM_ENABLE_THREADS=OFF \
  -DLLVM_TARGETS_TO_BUILD=X86 \
  -DLLVM_ENABLE_ASSERTIONS=ON \
  -DLLVM_USE_LINKER=lld \
  -DLLVM_CCACHE_BUILD=ON \
  -DMLIR_ENABLE_BINDINGS_PYTHON=ON \
  -DLLVM_EXTERNAL_PROJECTS=circt \
  -DCIRCT_INCLUDE_DOCS=ON \
  -DCIRCT_BINDINGS_PYTHON_ENABLED=ON \
  -DCIRCT_ENABLE_FRONTENDS=PyCDE \
  -DCMAKE_EXPORT_COMPILE_COMMANDS=TRUE \
  -DCMAKE_INSTALL_PREFIX=/home/jodemme/circt_install \
  -DQUESTA_PATH=/opt/eda/questa2021.4/linux_x86_64 \
  -DCMAKE_BUILD_TYPE=Debug \
  -DSTANDALONE_INSTALL=OFF \
  -DVERILATOR_DISABLE=OFF \
  -DLLVM_ENABLE_REVERSE_ITERATION=OFF \
  -DESI_RUNTIME=ON \
  -DESI_COSIM=ON \
  -DXRT_PATH=/opt/eda/xilinx/opt/xilinx/xrt \
  -DIVERILOG_DISABLE=ON \
  -DCIRCT_SLANG_FRONTEND_ENABLED=ON \
  -DLLVM_LIT_ARGS="-sv --show-unsupported" \
  -G Ninja \
  -DPython3_EXECUTABLE=/usr/bin/python3.8 \
  -DLLVM_EXTERNAL_CIRCT_SOURCE_DIR=/home/jodemme/circt \
  -DLLVM_USE_SANITIZER=""
```
